prompt: An anime-style promotional illustration of 3 characters running forward dynamically amidst a joyful painting scene under a bright blue sky with fluffy clouds. On the left, a blonde young woman in an elegant white ruffled dress and gloves smiles brightly, holding a paintbrush dripping with pink paint. In the center, a black-haired young man in blue overalls and a black t-shirt looks excited, holding a roll of masking tape and a green paint roller. On the right, an older laughing man wears dark traditional Japanese work clothes with a white towel around his neck. Colorful paint splatters fly through the air alongside floating props including 2 paint buckets, 2 paintbrushes, and 2 rolls of masking tape. At the top is a stylized title logo reading {argument name="main title" default="お嬢様は塗装を知らない"} decorated with paint splatters. Below it is a banner ribbon reading {argument name="subtitle" default="清楚なお嬢様 × 塗装男子"}. At the bottom, a bold tagline reads {argument name="bottom tagline" default="未知の世界でふたりの距離が縮まっていく…！"}. The style features vibrant colors and a light novel cover aesthetic.

breakdown.creativeCore: Anime Light Novel Cover with Painters：Generates a vibrant anime-style promotional illustration featuring characters painting, complete with stylized Japanese title logos and taglines.
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
